title: tragacantha arequipensis
intro: Tragacantha arequipensis, also known as the Arequipa's Sow Thistle, is a plant species from the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. The health benefits of Tragacantha arequipensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and act as an antimicrobial agent, which can help prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Tragacantha arequipensis typically involve infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to make a tea, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
